expectations.text: A new file docs/notes/us###.md was created

Frontmatter aliases entry is a human-readable title describing the pick action
expectations.evidence: Line 3: 'mark a request as picked once items are pulled'

expectations.text: ## role wikilink either references an existing persona alias (e.g. requestor, approver) OR a newly-created pn### that matches 'picker' or 'warehouse'

expectations.text: ## want describes marking the request as picked
expectations.evidence: Line 13: 'mark a request as picked once items are pulled from inventory'

expectations.text: ## because gives a non-empty motivation (mentions handoff or ready-for-pickup)
expectations.evidence: Line 16: 'that signals the request is ready for handoff'

expectations.text: ## acceptance_criteria has at least 1 bullet (derived if user did not specify, with disclosure)
expectations.evidence: Lines 19-22 list 4 derived criteria; agent disclosed derivation in response.md
